basics.name: Basics
basics.description: Fundamental concepts, getting started guides, and essential information about kluster.ai.

human_written_code.name: Human Written Code
human_written_code.description: Information and guides related to using kluster.ai to review human-written code.

ai_generated_code.name: AI Generated Code
ai_generated_code.description: Information and guides related to using kluster.ai to review AI-generated code.

on_demand_review.name: On-Demand Review
on_demand_review.description: Information and guides related to using kluster.ai for on-demand reviews, providing insights and feedback based on specific criteria or user requests.

automatic_review.name: Automatic Review
automatic_review.description: Information and guides related to using kluster.ai for automatic reviews, ensuring quality and relevance based on predefined algorithms and standards.

reference.name: Reference
reference.description: Comprehensive reference materials, including MCP tools, configuration options, and detailed response schema information.

external_knowledge.name: External Knowledge
external_knowledge.description: Information and guides related to connecting external tools like Jira to kluster.ai so code reviews can verify code against real project requirements and ticket specifications.

repo_reviews.name: Repo reviews
repo_reviews.description: Information and guides related to using kluster.ai Repo Reviews to perform system-wide codebase analysis and find cross-module bugs.

cli.name: CLI
cli.description: Information and guides related to using the kluster CLI for terminal-based code reviews, git hook integration, and CI/CD pipeline automation.

configuration.name: Configuration
configuration.description: Information and guides related to configuring kluster.ai Code Reviews, including options, custom rules, and ignore patterns.

pr_reviews.name: PR Reviews
pr_reviews.description: Information and guides related to using kluster.ai PR Reviews to automatically review pull requests on GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket.
